zh.lifeSummary: 當Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles於1460年出生在蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯時，他的父親Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles24歲，母親Lady Margaret Crichton17歲。他於1478年1月21日與Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr在蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1505年6月12日在蘇格蘭度福利爾享年45歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles于1460年出生在苏格兰吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯时，他的父亲Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles24岁，母亲Lady Margaret Crichton17岁。他于1478年1月21日与Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr在苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1505年6月12日在苏格兰度福利爾享年45岁，埋葬在苏格兰吉德布萊次爾特雷格萊斯。

nameMeanings.name: Herries
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  Norman, Scottish, English: locative name from Hérils in Trévières (Calvados). The name in England may have died out before the end of the medieval period, but survived into the modern period in Scotland.
2 English: variant of Herry with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Harris .

variants.name: Herry
meanings: Scots: Herry, to plunder, most properly to plunder birds' nests

variants.name: Harris
meanings: English (southern England and south Wales): from the personal name Harry + genitival -s. This surname is also established in Ireland, taken there principally during the Plantation of Ulster. However, in some cases, particularly in families coming from County Mayo, Harris can be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchadha. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

American shortened and altered form of Greek surnames begining with Cha(r)-, such as Chasandrinos (variant of Kassandrinos, a habitational name from the Kassandra peninsula of Chalkidiki), and various patronymics from the personal name Charalampos (see Charos ). In North America, the surname Harris may possibly also originate from a transferred use of the Greek personal (given) name Charis or Harris (shortened forms of Charalampos) as a surname (i.e. as a replacement of the original surname).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

variants.name: Heribert
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. An Old English form, Herebeorht, existed in England before the Conquest, but was superseded by the Norman form, which gave rise to an important surname. The family in question were earls of Pembroke in the 16th and 17th centuries; they included the poet George Herbert . By the end of the Middle Ages Herbert was little used, although it remained a favourite with some families, notably the Saint Quintins of East Yorkshire. Its greater frequency in Britain from the 19th century onwards is due partly to the trend for the revival of medieval names of Germanic origin and partly to the trend for the transferred use of surnames.

en.lifeSummary: When Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles was born in 1460, in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, his father, Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles, was 24 and his mother, Lady Margaret Crichton, was 17. He married Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr on 21 January 1478, in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 12 June 1505, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 45, and was buried in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles est né en 1460, à Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, son père, Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Crichton, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr le 21 janvier 1478, à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 12 juin 1505, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles 1460 in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles 24 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Crichton 17. Er hat am 21. Januar 1478 in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Juni 1505 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Dumfriesshire, Scotland und wurde in Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles è nato il nel 1460 nel Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Crichton, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr il 21 gennaio 1478, nel Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 12 giugno 1505, nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terreglesが1460年にスコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアテレグレスで生まれた時，父Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terreglesは24歳，母Lady Margaret Crichtonは17歳であった。1478年1月21日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズでMariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1505年6月12日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで45歳で死去し，スコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアテレグレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles(이)가 1460년 스컷랜드 커크쿠드브라이츠히르 터레글레스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Crichton(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1478년 1월 21일 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에서 Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1505년 6월 12일 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 커크쿠드브라이츠히르 터레글레스에 묻혔다.

pt.1460-1501: de 10 de janeiro de 1460 a 10 de janeiro de 1502
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles nasceu em 1460, em Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, seu pai, Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Crichton, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr em 21 de janeiro de 1478, em Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de junho de 1505, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Herbert Herries 6th Lord Herries of Terregles родился в 1460 г. в местности тирреглесь, кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Crichton, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr 21 января 1478 г. в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 12 июня 1505 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности тирреглесь, кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Mariëtte Carlyle Baroness of  Herr el 21 de enero de 1478, en Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 12 de junio de 1505, en Dumfriesshire, Scotland, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Terregles, Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland.
